name: Creamy Hot Shrimp Dip
recipeIngredient: 11 oz condensed cream of shrimp soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the cream cheese in a small saucepan over low heat.
2. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
3. Transfer to a chafing dish or fondue pot.
4. Serve hot with assorted dippers on the side.
